mapper.sql: id, title, summary, summary_message_sequence, use_knowledge_base, retrieval_mode, top_k, deleted, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM chat_sessions WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT s.id, s.title, s.summary, s.summary_message_sequence, s.use_knowledge_base, s.retrieval_mode, s.top_k, s.deleted, s.created_at, s.updated_at, COUNT(m.id) AS message_count FROM chat_sessions s LEFT JOIN chat_messages m ON m.conversation_id = s.id WHERE s.deleted = 0 GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM chat_sessions WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_sessions SET title = COALESCE(#{title}, title), use_knowledge_base = #{useKnowledgeBase}, retrieval_mode = #{retrievalMode}, top_k = #{topK}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_sessions WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, conversation_id, message_sequence, role, content, status, request_id, CASE WHEN agent_type IS NOT NULL THEN agent_type WHEN role = 'ASSISTANT' AND retrieval_mode IS NOT NULL THEN 'KNOWLEDGE_BASE' WHEN role = 'ASSISTANT' THEN 'GENERAL_CHAT' ELSE NULL END AS agent_type, retrieval_mode, sources_json, token_estimate, created_at FROM chat_messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY message_sequence ASC

SELECT id, conversation_id, message_sequence, role, content, status, request_id, CASE WHEN agent_type IS NOT NULL THEN agent_type WHEN role = 'ASSISTANT' AND retrieval_mode IS NOT NULL THEN 'KNOWLEDGE_BASE' WHEN role = 'ASSISTANT' THEN 'GENERAL_CHAT' ELSE NULL END AS agent_type, retrieval_mode, sources_json, token_estimate, created_at FROM chat_messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND message_sequence > #{sequence} ORDER BY message_sequence ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_sessions SET updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{conversationId}
